context: Tests whether the agent implements the rule evaluation loop correctly: sorting by priority descending, handling non-stackable exclusion via a flag, requiring coupon codes for coupon-linked rules, applying discounts to the running (already-discounted) price, capping discounts at cart subtotal, respecting usage limits, filtering by schedule, and supporting a dry-run mode.

checklist.name: Priority descending sort
checklist.description: Rules are fetched or sorted by priority in descending order (higher priority rules are processed first)

checklist.name: Non-stackable flag introduced
checklist.description: A boolean flag (or equivalent) is initialised to false before the evaluation loop and set to true after the first non-stackable rule is applied

checklist.name: Non-stackable rule skipped
checklist.description: A non-stackable rule is skipped (not applied) when another non-stackable rule has already been applied in the same evaluation pass

checklist.name: Stackable rules unaffected
checklist.description: Stackable rules continue to be applied even after a non-stackable rule has been applied

checklist.name: Coupon code check
checklist.description: A rule with a coupon_code is skipped when the cart does NOT include that coupon code; it is applied when the cart DOES include the matching code

checklist.name: Discount from currentPrice
checklist.description: Percentage or line-level discounts are calculated from the line's currentPrice (not basePrice / original price)

checklist.name: Discount cap at subtotal
checklist.description: Total discount is capped so it cannot exceed the cart subtotal (order total cannot go negative)

checklist.name: Usage limit respected
checklist.description: A rule whose usage_count has reached usage_limit is skipped during evaluation

checklist.name: Schedule filter applied
checklist.description: Only rules where is_active is true, starts_at <= now, and ends_at is null or > now are considered

checklist.name: Monetary values in cents
checklist.description: All monetary amounts (cartSubtotal, discountAmount, prices) are represented as integers (cents), not floating-point dollars

checklist.name: Dry-run / evaluate-only mode
checklist.description: The implementation includes an evaluate-only or dry-run flag/option that returns the evaluation result without persisting any applications
